summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 2 SPA implementation with lazy-loading, History API navigation, automatic data-testid generation, and contact form re-initialization. All core SPA functionality working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Form submission shows 501 error due to missing backend endpoint
minor_issues.impact: Expected behavior - no actual backend server running
minor_issues.note: This is expected since it's a static HTML project without backend

passed_tests: SPA navigation between all pages (Home/About/Works/Contact) without page reload
URL updates correctly using History API
Active navigation highlighting updates based on current route
Contact form functionality after SPA navigation with proper event handlers
Form validation prevents submission with empty required fields
Automatic data-testid generation for all interactive elements
Navigation links have proper data-testid attributes (a-home, a-about, a-works, a-contact)
Form elements have proper data-testid attributes (input-full-name, input-email, etc.)
Main content replacement works for all pages
AOS animations and UI re-initialization after navigation
No JavaScript console errors during navigation
